title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank Platinum Salary Account is offered only to selective customers. We realize that everyone in an organization is having special position of existence by having different monetary and banking needs. With your fast paced life, back-to-back meetings, tight deadlines, and mounting pressures our Platinum Salary Account has been specially designed keeping your requirements in mind. With this account you can expect banking anywhere, anytime.
  * Get a free Signature Debit card and set up direct debit for all your expenses
  * Personal Accident covers upto Rs.10 Lakhs and Purchase Protection upto Rs.2,00,000 upto 90 days
  * We provides concession in Demand drafts and pay orders


  * Upto Rs.25 Lakhs of Air Accident / Personal Accident / Disability Insurance Cover on account level
  * We have specialized representatives for our preferred customers to execute your banking needs more easily.
  * RTGS, NEFT, IMPS Fund Transfer services are available with it


  * Free online NEFT / RTGS / IMPS, SMS alerts
  * ATM cash withdrawal limit of Rs.3,00,000/- per day and POS usage limit of Rs.5,00,000/- per day
  * Attractive rates on PL/AL/HL and other variants as approved by Bank from time to time*


Get a Platinum / Gold / Silver / Bronze Salary Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
